Work Experience

Where I've built things that matter

CleverERP

Ruby on Rails Developer / Project Manager

◷ April 2025 – Present

erp.clever-builds.com ↗
  • Sole maintainer and developer for the ERP used by Clever Tiny Homes, a manufacturer of tiny homes in America.
  • Managed feature requests across multiple departments — sales, accounting, manufacturing, and HR.
  • Built a real-time browser push notification system using the W3C Push API, Service Workers, and VAPID authentication, enabling server-initiated notifications for inspection workflows.
  • Authored internal developer framework documentation and coding standards for a reusable CRUD table pattern in Rails, standardizing Turbo Stream-driven data tables, offcanvas forms, and pagination across the ERP to reduce boilerplate and enforce consistency.
Ruby on Rails PostgreSQL Bootstrap Hotwire Stimulus

TeamSatchel

Ruby on Rails Developer

◷ November 2024 – May 2025

teamsatchel.com ↗
  • Helped build and maintain features for Satchel One, a platform supporting 4,500+ schools worldwide, including modules for attendance, assessments, and communication.
  • Delivered user-focused solutions in a collaborative environment, aligned with TeamSatchel's values of innovation, integrity, and support for educators.
Ruby on Rails MySQL Bootstrap Hotwire Stimulus

DIS OPC Inc.

Software Engineer

◷ December 2021 – December 2024

safeboxiq.com ↗
  • Collaborated with a team of five in the development of SafeboxIQ, a document management & workflow tracking system for mortgage lending companies in the U.S.
  • Delivered product features and bug fixes within 2-week Sprints in an Agile environment.
  • Built features that support the document submission process, marketed as the main features of the application.
  • Developed an internal API to seamlessly integrate with an external application, improving document turnaround times and workflow efficiency over the company's previous SDK.
  • Optimized overall application architecture to promote modularity, scalability, and robustness by adhering to industry-standard coding practices.
  • Mentored software engineering interns through pair-programming sessions, fostering independent problem-solving skills.
Ruby on Rails ASP.NET PostgreSQL RSpec Docker Sidekiq Bootstrap jQuery CoffeeScript HandlebarsJS

Clinic Dev

Ruby on Rails Developer

◷ June 2018 – December 2021

effie.org ↗
  • Developed and maintained web applications across 3 different U.S.-based clients as part of an engineering duo.
  • Worked closely with senior engineers in upgrading Rails legacy apps and addressing technical debt.
  • Redesigned an existing feature and added functionality allowing an external team to manage content through a token-authenticated API.
  • Translated UI/UX wireframes from AdobeXD and Figma mock-ups into working code.
  • Collaborated with project managers and clients to build features, fix bugs, and keep them updated through PivotalTracker.
  • Effectively managed workload while pursuing educational goals, maintaining a high level of performance in both the workplace and academic studies.

About Me

Who I am beyond the code

I'm Steph - a full-stack Ruby on Rails developer, a husband, and a proud cat dad to 2 (and counting). Outside of code, you'll find me deep in a game, lost in a rabbit hole of faith research, or just enjoying the quiet chaos of home life.

Follower of Christ. Not the kind who stops asking hard questions. I love digging into theology, history, and the things that challenge what I think I know, because real conviction is worth testing.

Video games are my creative escape and honest hobby. I bring that same drive for curiosity, persistence, and love of systems into my work as a developer. Based in Cagayan de Oro City, Philippines, available for remote work worldwide.

8+
Years of Experience
10+
Projects Delivered
2
Cats owned (and counting)
∞
Mistakes Made, Still Learning

Freelance Ruby on Rails Developer

Freelance Ruby on Rails Developer

Freelance Frontend Developer

A fully interactive livestreaming and entertainment platform for web3 gaming with an in-stream prediction market. Translated UI/UX mockups and designs into a working frontend for an application interface built for a decentralized gaming ecosystem on Ethereum-based NFT games.

Get in Touch

Let's build something great together

I'm currently open to new opportunities, whether it's a full-time Rails role, a freelance engagement, or an exciting startup project. If you have something in mind, let's talk.
